$comment: Startup-framework hook registrations. Distribution-2's /sf:doctor greps the 'command' field for 'sf-wake-up.py' (primary) and the 'description' field for 'sf-wake-up:' (sentinel) — both should be preserved when editing.

hooks.description: sf-wake-up: SessionStart context injection per ADR-008 (fresh sessions)
sf-wake-up: re-inject context after compaction per hooks-guide compact-matcher pattern
